data.body: PASS 1 (T11 — Data-migration / backfill safety, overlay): NOT-APPLICABLE. The REVIEW_RESULT sidecar is an additive, append-only, reducer-ignored event with no backfill of existing data and no blocking DDL; rollout follows rebar's preserved-and-ignored-by-older-clones / readers-before-writers pattern. Clean chunk — no findings.
